INTRO_MESSAGE: Just a small step — pick a time, then wait.
SLOT_SUBTITLE: When you're ready, confirm your time.
LOCKED_MESSAGE_PREFIX: The location will be revealed on
RULE_1: After you confirm, a location will be revealed — and there’s no going back.
RULE_2: Both of you (Aashi and Akash) must participate together.
RULE_3: You both must travel to the location together.
RULE_WARN: You can do this anytime at your convenience — there’s no rush.
